projects.title: TrendStarz - Influencer & Brand Collaboration Platform
projects.subtitle: Building a Creator Marketplace for India
projects.description: Designed and developed a collaboration platform connecting influencers and brands for campaign partnerships, product promotions, and creator discovery.
projects.longDescription: TrendStarz is a startup product focused on simplifying collaborations between influencers and brands in India. I led the end-to-end product strategy, UX architecture, UI design, frontend engineering, and MVP development. The platform focuses on creator discovery, campaign invitations, profile verification, collaboration workflows, and scalable marketplace UX patterns tailored for Indian users.

images.caption: Brand dashboard for managing influencer campaigns
Advanced influencer discovery and filtering experience

projects.role: Founder, Senior UX Designer & Full Stack Developer

problemStatement.title: Problem Statement
problemStatement.content: Small and mid-level influencers in India struggle to discover brand collaborations, while brands face difficulty finding relevant creators with genuine engagement. Existing platforms are either too expensive, overly complex, or focused only on large creators. TrendStarz aims to simplify influencer-brand collaborations through a scalable, trust-driven marketplace experience.

marketOpportunity.title: Market Opportunity
marketOpportunity.content: India’s creator economy is rapidly growing across Instagram, YouTube, and short-form video platforms. Thousands of influencers seek monetization opportunities while brands increasingly depend on creator-led marketing. TrendStarz focuses on bridging this gap with an affordable and scalable collaboration platform tailored for the Indian market.

userTypes.description: Businesses and startups looking to discover influencers, launch campaigns, manage invitations, and track collaboration outcomes.
Content creators seeking brand deals, campaign opportunities, profile visibility, and long-term collaboration partnerships.

uxChallenges: Balancing UX for both influencers and brands
Creating scalable onboarding and verification flows
Building MVP with startup budget constraints
productFlows: Contact unlock and premium access flow

wireframes.title: Wireframes & UX Exploration
wireframes.content: Initial wireframes focused on simplifying creator discovery, reducing friction during onboarding, and improving collaboration visibility between brands and influencers. Multiple iterations were explored to optimize campaign invitations and response workflows.

uiSystem.title: UI System
uiSystem.content: A scalable design system was created to maintain consistency across dashboards, campaign cards, profile components, forms, and mobile-responsive layouts. The visual language focuses on clarity, trust, and modern startup aesthetics.

mvpArchitecture.title: MVP Architecture
mvpArchitecture.content: TrendStarz was designed as a lean MVP platform with modular frontend architecture, scalable backend APIs, secure email verification flows, and responsive UI components to support future feature expansion and mobile applications.

businessThinking.title: Business Thinking
businessThinking.content: The platform was strategically designed with freemium and premium collaboration models in mind. UX decisions considered user acquisition, creator engagement, campaign visibility, monetization opportunities, and scalable marketplace growth.

futureVision.title: Future Vision
futureVision.content: Future roadmap includes AI-driven influencer recommendations, smart campaign matching, creator analytics, automated collaboration scoring, mobile applications, and advanced campaign management tools for brands.

results: Established startup-ready UX and technical infrastructure
Positioned platform for future AI-driven creator discovery

projects.title: Enterprise Healthcare Operations Platform
projects.subtitle: Optimizing Clinical & Operational Workflows
projects.description: Designed enterprise healthcare workflows and dashboard systems for medical professionals, improving operational efficiency, patient management, and enterprise usability.
projects.longDescription: Led UX initiatives for a large-scale healthcare operations platform used by medical professionals, support teams, and internal operational stakeholders. The project focused on simplifying complex healthcare workflows, improving appointment management systems, optimizing account-related experiences, and enhancing usability across high-density enterprise dashboards. The platform required scalable UX architecture, role-based experiences, and structured data visualization tailored for healthcare environments.

images.caption: Enterprise healthcare dashboard optimized for operational workflows
Workflow optimization for appointment and account management

problemStatement.title: Problem Statement
problemStatement.content: Healthcare operational teams faced workflow inefficiencies caused by fragmented interfaces, complex navigation systems, dense information architecture, and inconsistent user experiences across multiple enterprise modules.

businessImpact.title: Business Impact
businessImpact.content: The UX redesign focused on improving operational efficiency, reducing workflow friction, enhancing usability for healthcare professionals, and establishing scalable enterprise UX foundations for future platform growth.

solutions: Improved workflow clarity and navigation hierarchy
Optimized appointment and account management experiences
Established structured UX consistency across the platform
results: Reduced usability friction for internal teams
Improved task visibility and workflow prioritization

projects.title: Enterprise Commerce Experience Platform
projects.subtitle: Optimizing Digital Shopping & Conversion Workflows
projects.description: Redesigned a large-scale commerce platform focused on improving user experience, conversion optimization, product discovery, and scalable mobile-first shopping interactions.
projects.longDescription: Led the UX transformation of a high-traffic digital commerce platform focused on improving customer engagement, simplifying checkout experiences, and optimizing product discovery workflows. The project involved user behavior analysis, UX audits, conversion-focused redesign strategies, design system improvements, and scalable mobile-first experience architecture.

images.caption: Optimized commerce homepage and navigation experience
User flow exploration and checkout optimization wireframes

problemStatement.title: Problem Statement
problemStatement.content: The existing commerce experience suffered from high cart abandonment, inconsistent navigation patterns, weak product discovery, and friction-heavy checkout flows impacting conversions and customer retention.

businessImpact.title: Business Impact
businessImpact.content: The redesign focused on improving conversion performance, simplifying shopping workflows, enhancing product discoverability, and creating scalable UX foundations for long-term platform growth.

solutions: Improved visual consistency across the platform
results: Improved customer engagement across shopping flows
Enhanced mobile usability and interaction clarity
Established scalable UX foundation for future growth

projects.title: Smart Food Ordering & Delivery Platform
projects.subtitle: Optimizing Real-Time Ordering Experiences
projects.description: Designed a modern food delivery platform focused on fast ordering workflows, real-time delivery tracking, mobile usability, and scalable customer experiences.
projects.longDescription: Led the UX design and mobile experience optimization for a food ordering and delivery platform focused on simplifying customer ordering journeys and improving delivery visibility. The project involved designing intuitive restaurant discovery workflows, real-time tracking interfaces, checkout optimization, and scalable mobile-first interaction systems for high-frequency users.

images.caption: Optimized mobile ordering and restaurant discovery experience

problemStatement.title: Problem Statement
problemStatement.content: Users experienced friction during food ordering, customization, and delivery tracking workflows. The platform required a faster, more intuitive mobile experience capable of handling high-frequency ordering behavior and real-time delivery interactions.

businessImpact.title: Business Impact
businessImpact.content: The redesign focused on improving ordering speed, customer retention, delivery visibility, and mobile usability while supporting scalable restaurant onboarding and operational efficiency.

results: Enhanced mobile usability and ordering efficiency

projects.title: Digital Financial Management Platform
projects.subtitle: Simplifying Personal Finance & Investment Experiences
projects.description: Designed a modern financial management platform focused on budgeting, expense tracking, investment planning, and data-driven financial decision experiences.
projects.longDescription: Led UX design initiatives for a digital financial management platform aimed at helping users better manage budgeting, expense tracking, savings, and financial planning workflows. The project focused on simplifying complex financial information, improving trust and usability, and creating scalable dashboard experiences with intuitive data visualization patterns for web and mobile users.

images.caption: Financial overview dashboard with budgeting and analytics insights
Interactive expense tracking and financial planning workflows

problemStatement.title: Problem Statement
problemStatement.content: Users struggled to understand complex financial information, manage expenses efficiently, and maintain visibility into budgeting and investment goals through fragmented and difficult-to-navigate financial interfaces.

businessImpact.title: Business Impact
businessImpact.content: The redesign focused on improving financial clarity, increasing user engagement, strengthening trust through UX design, and creating scalable financial dashboard systems aligned with long-term platform growth.

solutions: Improved budgeting and expense tracking workflows
Established scalable design consistency across modules

projects.title: Digital Learning & Education Platform
projects.subtitle: Enhancing Student Engagement & Learning Experiences
projects.description: Designed a scalable digital learning platform focused on improving student engagement, course accessibility, learning workflows, and educational usability across multiple user roles.
projects.longDescription: Led UX design improvements for a large-scale learning management platform serving students, instructors, and administrators. The project focused on simplifying educational workflows, improving course navigation, enhancing progress visibility, and creating accessible learning experiences optimized for both desktop and mobile users. The platform included course management systems, assessments, progress tracking, and interactive educational experiences.

images.caption: Student learning dashboard with course progress and activity tracking

problemStatement.title: Problem Statement
problemStatement.content: Students and instructors faced usability challenges caused by complex course structures, inconsistent learning workflows, poor mobile experiences, and limited visibility into educational progress and engagement.

businessImpact.title: Business Impact
businessImpact.content: The redesign focused on improving learning engagement, simplifying educational workflows, enhancing accessibility, and creating scalable UX systems to support long-term digital education growth.

results: Reduced friction across student and instructor experiences
Established scalable learning platform UX foundations

projects.title: Digital Travel & Booking Experience Platform
projects.subtitle: Simplifying Multi-Service Travel Planning
projects.description: Designed a modern travel booking platform focused on personalized trip planning, seamless booking workflows, and optimized multi-device travel experiences.
projects.longDescription: Led UX design initiatives for a digital travel booking platform integrating flights, hotels, and travel experiences into a unified booking ecosystem. The project focused on simplifying travel discovery, improving booking workflows, enhancing mobile usability, and creating scalable personalization experiences tailored for modern travelers.

images.caption: Travel discovery and booking experience with personalized recommendations
Mobile-first travel booking and itinerary workflows

problemStatement.title: Problem Statement
problemStatement.content: Users experienced friction while searching, comparing, and booking travel services across fragmented workflows. The platform required a simplified booking experience capable of handling flights, accommodations, and activity planning within a unified interface.

businessImpact.title: Business Impact
businessImpact.content: The redesign focused on improving booking conversions, simplifying travel planning workflows, enhancing personalization experiences, and creating scalable UX systems for long-term platform growth.

solutions: Created intuitive search and filtering systems
Improved pricing visibility and comparison experiences
Established scalable UX consistency across booking modules
results: Improved search discoverability and trip planning clarity
Established scalable travel platform UX foundations
